programme.desc: A New York socialite&amp;amp;apos;s carefree existence catches the attention of a young writer who has moved into her apartment building.

programme.title: New York, New York
programme.desc: A smooth-talking musician and a determined lounge singer embark on a rocky romance as their careers begin a long uphill climb.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: Over the course of 30 years, a widowed mother and her daughter navigate their complicated relationship and life&amp;amp;apos;s dramas.

programme.title: Natural Born Killers
programme.desc: Two young, attractive serial killers become tabloid-TV darlings. As a sensationalistic press reports on the pair, they go on a blood-drenched, murderous road trip. A controversial, satirical look at violence, murder, and the American media.

programme.title: White Nights
programme.desc: A Russian ballet star who has defected is forced by a twist of fate back to the USSR.

programme.title: Georgy Girl
programme.desc: A young woman in 1960s Swinging London faces a dilemma when she is wooed by both her father&amp;amp;apos;s older boss and the boyfriend of her pregnant flatmate.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely bad team so they&amp;amp;apos;ll lose and she can move them to Florida. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The unlikeliest winning team in baseball is back, but success has seen these cocky oddballs grow soft as they eye up the World Series.

programme.title: Major League: Back to the Minors
programme.desc: The South Carolina Buzz is about to face off against the Minnesota Twins. Unfortunately, the Buzz are nine players short of a dream team.

programme.title: A Man for All Seasons
programme.desc: The story of Sir Thomas More, who stood up to King Henry VIII when the King rejected the Roman Catholic Church. As More stood by his principles, the King responded with grave charges of treason.

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: A career criminal considers getting out of the business after one last score, while an obsessive cop desperately tries to put him behind bars.

programme.title: The King of Comedy
programme.desc: Aspiring stand-up comedian Rupert Pupkin is desperate to be famous. So desperate, he&apos;s willing to do anything to catch a break.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: After being betrayed by his partner in a train heist, an outlaw teams up with a bodyguard to exact his revenge.

programme.title: La Bamba

programme.title: Birdy

programme.title: 84 Charing Cross Road
programme.desc: An unconventional trans-continental correspondence blooms between a New York book lover and a London book store owner.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times

programme.title: The Passenger

programme.title: Men At Work
programme.desc: The lives of two rubbish men are turned upside down when they discover the city commissioner&apos;s body in a bin on their route.

programme.title: Tommy

programme.title: The Elephant Man
programme.desc: With a facial difference due to a rare disease, John Merrick is abused and ostracised, living his life as the &apos;Elephant Man&apos; in a circus sideshow. However, Dr Treves sees the person beyond the deformities.

programme.title: The Natural

programme.title: The Unforgiven
